title: Sanitize/structure the prior-attempt findings block injected into the build prompt
notes: ADR-0076 slice C architect finding #4 (LOW, note-only): readContinuationFindings injects failure-digest.json verbatim (8KB cap + TrimSpace) into build's ComposePrompt. Content is pipeline-self-produced and the kernel floor is deterministic, so no gate bypass — but add the same control-character hygiene the inboxbatch sanitizer applies, and prefer rendering the digest's structured fields over raw JSON.
